backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a German payroll (Lohnabrechnung) backend with wage entry CRUD, amount calculation (quantity × rate × surcharge), payroll summary computation (Brutto, SV, tax, net), and default seed data for six wage types.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, used as build/documentation reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app at the `#root` div and loads the Vite entry point `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up React Query, renders the app header with Lohnabrechnung branding, the WageCalculator page, a footer with caffeine.ai attribution, and a Sonner toast provider.
frontend/src/components/PayrollSummary.t: React component displaying a German payroll summary card with nine computed values (Brutto, SV, tax, net, payout), an editable Lohnsteuer input with save button, loading skeletons, and deductions shown in red.
frontend/src/components/WageEntryForm.ts: Form component for creating or editing wage entries with fields for code, description, quantity, rate, surcharge, tax/SV/GB flags, a fixed-amount toggle, live Betrag preview, and validation.
frontend/src/components/WageEntryTable.t: Renders a table of wage entries with edit and delete actions, showing columns for wage type code, description, quantity, rate, surcharge, tax/SV/GB flags, and amount, plus a total footer row.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks and mutations for CRUD operations on wage entries, fetching payroll summary, and managing Lohnsteuer (wage tax) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSeedDefaultEntries: Thin wrapper around useGetAllWageEntries that exposes seeding/loading state, relying on the backend to auto-seed default wage entries on first call to an empty store.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a comprehensive set of CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/WageCalculator.tsx: Main page component that orchestrates the wage calculator UI, combining the entry form, entries table, and payroll summary with add/edit state management and seeding error handling.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), fonts, border radii, shadows, and accordion animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 3) describing the German payroll simulator app architecture, known issues, and a list of pending feature requests (AR-1 through AR-6+) covering PAP engine embedding, payroll entry, tax parameters, results panel, employer costs, and entrepreneur KPIs.
